span.p:
cost = (prompt_tokens + completion_tokens) × $/1M tokens
'hello world' = 2 tokens · code and non-English tokenise 3–10× worse

span.p:
Overflow failure modes:
1. Framework silently truncates
2. Model degrades middle content ('lost in the middle')
3. API returns 400 context-limit error

span.p:
SAMPLER
temperature: 0=greedy, >0=stochastic
top_k: caps candidate pool
top_p: nucleus sampling
seed: best-effort reproducibility
